calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TONY KIRKE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Jerome J. Ghigliotti, Jr., Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 773-1272, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Seth Senestro, Defendant in Pro Per, (707) 407-7050, appearing and opposing party. Motion Granted. Defendants have failed to raise a triable issue of fact. Order signed in Open Court. Judgment signed in Open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
